game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: This 2D sandbox adventure game allows players to explore vast, procedurally generated worlds, mine resources, craft items, build structures, and engage in combat against various enemies and bosses. The game features a dynamic day/night cycle influencing enemy spawns, and progression is driven by acquiring better tools, armor, and weapons through crafting and defeating bosses, which in turn unlock new materials, NPCs, and world events.
game_info.description: Explore a procedurally generated 2D world where you mine resources, craft better tools, build structures, and battle enemies. Progress through tiers of equipment by defeating bosses that unlock new materials and areas. Survive the dangerous nights when more enemies spawn, and work toward crafting the ultimate gear to defeat the final boss and win the game.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character left/right and jump
Z: Mine/Attack (hold to charge for stronger attack)
SPACE: Place blocks from inventory
Shift: Open/Close crafting menu
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and mining mechanics. Validates that the player can move around the world, mine blocks, and collect resources. Ensures the inventory system works correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character around the map, mine various blocks to collect resources, and verify that the inventory updates properly. Test jumping and collision detection with terrain.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, mines blocks, collects resources, and the inventory reflects collected items. No collision errors or movement bugs occur.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement and mining mechanics. Validates that the player can move around the world, mine blocks, and collect resources. Ensures the inventory system works correctly.
TEST_1.strategy: Move the player character around the map, mine various blocks to collect resources, and verify that the inventory updates properly. Test jumping and collision detection with terrain.
TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves, mines blocks, collects resources, and the inventory reflects collected items. No collision errors or movement bugs occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete progression path to win the game. Implements optimal strategy to gather resources, craft tools, defeat bosses, and ultimately win.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Mine initial resources, craft basic tools, upgrade through all equipment tiers, defeat all bosses in order, unlock new materials, craft ultimate gear, and defeat the final boss.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating the final boss. All progression milestones are reached in optimal order.
TEST_2.description: Tests the complete progression path to win the game. Implements optimal strategy to gather resources, craft tools, defeat bosses, and ultimately win.
TEST_2.strategy: Mine initial resources, craft basic tools, upgrade through all equipment tiers, defeat all bosses in order, unlock new materials, craft ultimate gear, and defeat the final boss.
TEST_2.expected: Player achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating the final boss. All progression milestones are reached in optimal order.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests crafting system and equipment progression. Validates that crafting recipes work correctly and that equipped items provide proper stat bonuses.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Gather specific resources, open crafting menu, craft various items from different tiers, equip them, and verify stat changes.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All crafting recipes work correctly, items are added to inventory, and equipped items properly modify player stats like mining power and damage.
TEST_3.description: Tests crafting system and equipment progression. Validates that crafting recipes work correctly and that equipped items provide proper stat bonuses.

TEST_3.expected: All crafting recipes work correctly, items are added to inventory, and equipped items properly modify player stats like mining power and damage.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests combat mechanics and enemy AI. Validates that combat works correctly, enemies behave intelligently, and boss fights are winnable.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Engage in combat with various enemy types, test damage calculation, dodge enemy attacks, and attempt to defeat a boss.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Combat system works correctly with proper damage calculation, enemies follow their AI patterns, and bosses can be defeated with appropriate gear.
TEST_4.description: Tests combat mechanics and enemy AI. Validates that combat works correctly, enemies behave intelligently, and boss fights are winnable.
TEST_4.strategy: Engage in combat with various enemy types, test damage calculation, dodge enemy attacks, and attempt to defeat a boss.
TEST_4.expected: Combat system works correctly with proper damage calculation, enemies follow their AI patterns, and bosses can be defeated with appropriate gear.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests day/night cycle and its effects on gameplay. Validates that time progresses correctly and affects enemy spawn rates.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Play through multiple day/night cycles, observe enemy spawn patterns, and verify that night is more dangerous with increased enemy spawns.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Day/night cycle progresses smoothly, night spawns more/tougher enemies, and the cycle affects gameplay meaningfully.
TEST_5.description: Tests day/night cycle and its effects on gameplay. Validates that time progresses correctly and affects enemy spawn rates.
TEST_5.strategy: Play through multiple day/night cycles, observe enemy spawn patterns, and verify that night is more dangerous with increased enemy spawns.
TEST_5.expected: Day/night cycle progresses smoothly, night spawns more/tougher enemies, and the cycle affects gameplay meaningfully.
